description.para: The numeric values are row indizes in the waves returned by WB_GetControlWithDeltaWvs().

briefdescription.para: Check if the given frequency is a valid setting for the noise epoch.
Check if the given frequency is a valid setting for the noise epoch.

detaileddescription.para: Requires a scaled frequency as input, see DisplayHelpTopic "FilterIIR"

memberdef.argsstring: (wave wv, variable pulseType, variable amplitude, variable first, variable last)
memberdef.name: WB_CreatePulse

briefdescription.para: Convert the numeric epoch type to a stringified version.
Convert the stringified epoch type to a numerical one.

memberdef.argsstring: (string text, variable entryType, string key=defaultValue, variable sweep=defaultValue, variable epoch=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: WB_GetWaveNoteEntry

briefdescription.para: Query stimset wave note entries.

parameterdescription.para: [optional] named entry to return, not required for VERSION_ENTRY

memberdef.argsstring: (string text, variable entryType, string key=defaultValue, variable sweep=defaultValue, variable epoch=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: WB_GetWaveNoteEntryAsNumber

memberdef.argsstring: (wave stimset, variable sweep, variable epoch, variable *pulseToPulseLength)
memberdef.name: WB_GetPulsesFromPTSweepEpoch

briefdescription.para: Create a wave segment as combination of existing stim sets.
Return the stim set wave and create it permanently in the datafolder hierarchy.

simplesect.para: stimset wave ref or an invalid wave ref

briefdescription.para: Return the name of one of the three stimset parameter waves.

parameterdescription.para: indicate parameter wave (WP, WPT, or SegWvType), see ParameterWaveTypes
[optional, defaults to false] nwbFormat has type as suffix

simplesect.para: name as string

briefdescription.para: Return the wave WP for a stim set.

simplesect.para: valid/invalid wave reference

briefdescription.para: Return the wave WPT for a stim set.

simplesect.para: valid/invalid wave reference

briefdescription.para: Return the wave SegmentWvType for a stim set.

simplesect.para: valid/invalid wave reference

briefdescription.para: Check if stimset needs to be created.

detaileddescription.para:
Stimset is recreated
if one of the parameter waves was modified
the custom wave that was used to build the stimset was modified

simplesect.para: 1 if stimset needs to be recreated, 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Check if the stimset wave note has the latest version.
Check if parameter waves' are newer than the saved stimset.

simplesect.para: 1 if Parameter waves were modified, 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Return a checksum of the stimsets and its parameter waves.

detaileddescription.para: Uses the entry from the stimset wave note if available.

briefdescription.para: Calculcate the checksum of the stimsets and its parameter waves.
Get modification date of saved stimset wave.

simplesect.para: date of last modification as double precision Igor date/time value

briefdescription.para: Return the current stimset wave for the wavebuilder.
Return the stim set wave.

detaileddescription.para: As opposed to WB_CreateAndGetStimSet this function returns a free wave only

parameterdescription.para: [optional, defaults to WaveBuilderPanel GUI settings] name of the set

simplesect.para: free wave with the stim set, invalid wave ref if the WP* parameter waves could not be found.

briefdescription.para: Return a free wave with indizes referencing the values with delta values.

detaileddescription.para:
Indizes are into WP and reference the entry with the value itself.
AddDimLabelsToWP()
Constants are defined at ControlDeltaIndizes.

briefdescription.para: Return a free wave with wave references where the values with delta reside in.
Return the WP/WPT/SegWvType dimension labels for the related delta controls given the index into WP of the value itself.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, 1 otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (string setName, wave WP, wave WPOrig, WaveText WPT, wave SegWvType, wave SegWvTypeOrig, variable sweep, variable numSweeps)
memberdef.name: WB_AddDelta

briefdescription.para: Add delta to appropriate parameters.

detaileddescription.para: Relies on alternating sequence of parameter and delta's in parameter waves as documented in WB_MakeWaveBuilderWave().

memberdef.argsstring: (variable operation, variable *value, variable *delta, variable dme, string ldelta, variable originalValue, variable sweep, variable numSweeps, string setName, string paramName)
memberdef.name: WB_CalculateParameterWithDelta

briefdescription.para: Calculate the new value of a parameter taking into account the delta operation.

parameterdescription.para: parameter value (might be incremented by former delta application calls)
name of the stimulus set (used for error reporting)
name of the parameter (used for error reporting)

memberdef.argsstring: (wave WP, WaveText WPT, wave SegWvType, variable stepCount, variable numEpochs, variable channelType, variable updateEpochIDWave, string stimset=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: WB_MakeWaveBuilderWave

briefdescription.para: Update the accumulated stimset duration for the mouse selection via GetEpochID()

parameterdescription.para: accumulated duration in the stimset for the first step

briefdescription.para: Query the stimset wave note for the sweep/set specific ITI.
Try to recover a custom wave when in the old format (aka with only a wave name and not a full path)

parameterdescription.para: index of epoch containing custom wave

memberdef.argsstring: (wave WP, wave SegWvType, variable epoch, variable type, variable stepCount)
memberdef.name: WB_InitializeSeed

briefdescription.para: Initialize the seed value of the pseudo random number generator.
Update the shorthand/stimset wave for the epoch type Combine

detaileddescription.para: The rows are sorted by creationDate of the WP/stimset wave to try to keep the shorthands constants even when new stimsets are added.

briefdescription.para: Generate a unique textual representation of an index.

detaileddescription.para: Returns the alphabet for 1-26, and then A1, B1, ..., Z1000

briefdescription.para: Parse the formula from the epoch type Combine

parameterdescription.para: math formula to execute, all operators which Igor can grok are allowed
parsed formula structure, with shorthands replaced by stimsets, empty on parse error, ready to be executed by WB_FillWaveFromFormula()

simplesect.para: 0 on success, 1 on parse errors (currently not many are found)

briefdescription.para: Replace shorthands with the real stimset names suffixed with ?
Add wave ranges to every stimset (location marked by ?) and add a left hand side to the formula.
Replace all stimsets suffixed with ? by their shorthands.
Get all custom waves that are used by the supplied stimset.

simplesect.para: a wave of wave references

briefdescription.para: Get all custom waves that are used by the supplied stimset.

simplesect.para: a text wave with paths to custom waves.

briefdescription.para: Try to upgrade all epochs with custom waves from the stimsetlist.

detaileddescription.para: you can only use this function if the custom wave is present in the current experiment. do not try to upgrade when loading stimsets. The custom waves have to be loaded first.

simplesect.para: a text wave with paths to custom waves.

briefdescription.para: Search for stimsets in formula epochs.

detaileddescription.para: a stimset (parent) can depend on other stimsets (child)

simplesect.para: non-unique list of all (child) stimsets

briefdescription.para: Get children of current parent stimset.

parameterdescription.para: [optional: defaults to current WB panel] specify parent stimset.

simplesect.para: number of parents stimsets that were moved to child stimsets

briefdescription.para: Recursively descents into parent stimsets.

detaileddescription.para: You can not recurse into a stimset that depends on itself.

simplesect.para: list of stimsets that derive from the input stimset

briefdescription.para: Recursively descents into parent stimsets.

parameterdescription.para: can be a list of stimsets (separated by ;) or a simple string

simplesect.para: list of stimsets that derive from the input stimsets

briefdescription.para: check if parameter waves exist

simplesect.para: 1 if parameter waves exist, 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: check if (custom) stimset exists

simplesect.para: 1 if stimset wave was found, 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Kill Parameter waves for stimset.
Kill (custom) stimset.
Determine if the stimset is third party or from MIES.

detaileddescription.para: Third party stimsets don't have all parameter waves

simplesect.para: true if from third party, false otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (WaveText WPT, string name, variable var=defaultValue, string str=defaultValue, wave wv=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: WB_AddAnalysisParameterIntoWPT

briefdescription.para: Internal use only.
Internal use only.

memberdef.argsstring: (string baseName, variable stimulusType, wave SegWvType, wave WP, WaveText WPT, variable setNumber, variable saveAsBuiltin)
memberdef.name: WB_SaveStimSet

memberdef.argsstring: (string basename, variable stimulusType, variable setNumber, string suffix=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: WB_AssembleSetName

briefdescription.para: Return the name of a stimulus set build up from the passed parts.
Split the full setname into its three parts: prefix, stimulusType and set number.
Changes an existing stimset to a third party stimset.
WB Stimulus set creation
